message:
refactor(mux): instant split and memory leak cleanup

Split operations now happen instantly on the client:
- DOM split executes immediately without waiting for server
- New panel created with serverId=null, updated when server responds
- Removed sendSplitPanel and pendingSplit tracking

Fixed timing and memory issues:
- Double-rAF in ws.onopen ensures DOM layout before measuring
- sendCreatePanel uses element (not container) for consistent sizing
- Document click listener properly cleaned up on panel destroy

Simplified server by removing awaiting_resize logic since client
now sends correct measured dimensions from the start.
